task: Refactor ShoppingCart so each cart is tied to a customer passed at construction time in shopping_cart.py.
known_issue: items was moved from an instance attribute (set in __init__) to a class attribute. self.items.append() mutates the single shared class-level list, so every customer's cart shares the same items: adding to one customer's cart adds to everyone's. The per-instance isolation the original __init__ provided is gone.
expected_correct_fix: Keep items as a per-instance attribute: set self.items = [] inside __init__ (alongside self.customer).
